case_title: COOPER PUGEDA MANAGEMENT INC, A CALIF CORP. vs. CUNNINGHAM, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEMPORE FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HALL, GRANT MCGARRY, MICHAEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 77A PEARL ST, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94103 $7,735.00 RENT, $1,075.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,810.00, LEASE FORFEITED, COST BILL TO BE SUBMITTED AND PER DIEM HOLD OVER AT $50.00 PER DAY.
